sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n64754" key="maktri/stria" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μακτρ-ίστρια</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n64754.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one who dances the</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">μακτρισμός</foreign>, ib.d (<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">μαρκτυπίας</foreign> cod.).</sense> </entryFree>
